Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation across all cases
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation to occur after SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Average duration of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation when preceded by SW-Reviewer Agreed in complex reviewer assignment variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Time elapsed from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in variants involving multiple reviewer declines or reminders
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Average time until SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation is performed after the last SW-Reviewer Agreed in a case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation following at least one SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Minimum waiting time to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation after the first SW-Reviewer Agreed in multi-reviewer scenarios
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Time from the final SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in cases that eventually lead to SW-EIC Major Revision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation compared to the time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Average time for SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in variants where reviewer selection experienced delays (e.g., \SW-Reviewer Selection is 1 week late\)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Time of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation measured from the moment the required number of reviewers have agreed (i.e., after the last SW-Reviewer Agreed)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Total time it takes SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation to be reached after SW-Initial Reviewer Selection in cases with at least one SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in high-efficiency variants (frequency ≥ 3)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Cycle Time of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation defined as the interval between the last SW-Reviewer Agreed and the start of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'
